feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)

entry.title: Never mess with us again
entry.summary:
Author: animelike482

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 147,175Chapters: 33/?Kudos: 27

Summary: After being kidnapped by a bunch of criminals from the far right wing, Christopher suffers from terrible nightmares. They're as heavy, that he sleeps with his dads.The trial went by and Christopher's statement was under protection, but without Eddie allowed to be present. Because Athena was too afraid, that he would do something stupid. So Buck was entrusted with Chris.When finally a settlement and a stable and happy Christopher are within reach, Athena calls to inform them of the breakout from the inmates who kidnapped Chris.

entry.title: Just A Phone Call Away (Feels So Far)
entry.summary:
Author: SweetTea186

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,319Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 19

Summary: It isn't Eddie's fault, technically, that he didn't tell anyone at the 118 that he was married. Okay, so maybe it was. Just a little bit. But in his defence, Buck is away for work all the time, and none of them technically asked. It is getting pretty hard to hide the late night calls, though.

entry.title: How Far Do I Have to Fall?
entry.summary:
Author: shadowkatninjawarrior

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,941Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 784

Summary: A week into the lawsuit, Buck realises what a mistake he's making. But when he tries to back out, Mackey responds with blackmail. Confronted with evidence of the years Buck spent as a sex worker to survive, Buck takes it to the police. One hush hush sting operation later, Buck can head back to work. Everything will be fine.It won't matter that no one knows about the blackmail... Right?Or,More lawsuit angst, because I simply can't help myself.

entry.title: Exile (I Think I've Seen This Before, and I Didn't Like The Ending)
entry.summary:
Author: MysticCloud97

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,846Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 168

Summary: Buck was struggling. The pills were the only thing keeping him sane after the kidnapping. Everyone knew that he was hiding something. It just took one too many pills for them to realise how broken Buck was. Now they must rally together to bring their sunshine back. And to stop him following in Bobby's footsteps.

entry.title: Joyride
entry.summary:
Author: omegapilled

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,928Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: There's a dimly lit room, with a cage as the center point. You can hear the cheap aux get plugged in and a soft buzzing before the lights go completely out.Buck slightly jumped at the scene, not expecting the lights to fully cut in that manner.The crackling over the loud speak had came to a halt and finally presented a voice. "Ladies, and gentlemen. Are you ready !!!" The crowd seemed to be beaming, everyone pushing with urgency to get closer to the center.

entry.title: They all say that it gets better (But what if I don't?)
entry.summary:
Author: Buddie_stan

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,878Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 59

Summary: Buck never meant for it to get this bad. He didn't even realize when it started to become a problem. First it was just when the pain was really bad. Then it was when he felt sore. He just wanted to stop the pain before it got too bad. But now the pain is gone and yet here he is, popping pills like he’d die if he didn’t. He tried to convince himself that it wasn’t a problem. That it wasn’t as bad as it seems, but the words come out sour. It stains his brain like a raging headache. Then came the lying. And the guilt. And soon enough two pills weren’t enough to numb the ache in his chest. It wasn’t enough to stop the shame he felt building up in his gut. He knew Bobby would be disappointed in him. How could he not? He was disappointed in himself. Everyone thought he was fine. He’d pick out a few smiles he’d wear in the morning and let it play out through the day. It was believable to everyone. Everyone except Eddie. He could see past the fake smiles, and the senseless excuses. He always did. It’s something Buck was always grateful for. Before Buck started lying his ass off, now it just seemed to make him more on edge.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Catch Me When I Fall
entry.summary:
Author: Ollie_22

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,850Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 207

Summary: ‘You’re in the hospital.’ His sister–what was her name?--supplied. ‘There was an accident at work.’Work? Where did he work again? In the clouds? Maybe he fell from one of them.‘Did you want me to get Eddie?’A warm feeling bloomed in his chest. Eddie…yes that word was familiar. He nodded, slowly.His sister smiled softly and squeezed his hand. His eyelids drooped, heavy.‘You rest.’ Her voice was soft. ‘Eddie will be here when you wake.’ ORBuck has been managing his recent bipolar diagnosis well. He and Eddie are finally together, he's back at work and everything is looking up. That is until, lightning strikes, Buck goes off his meds and well, things spiral from there. (Sequel to 'I didn't Know')

entry.title: Your Love is My Drug
entry.summary:
Author: thatsanovelidea

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,238Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 29

Summary: Buck knows it’s not sustainable by the fourth night, when he wakes up sweating and unable to breathe, one hand clutching his ribs where she’d stuck him the first time with the cattle prod and the other reaching to turn on the lamp at his bedside. It’s been one week since he got back, so four sleepless nights puts him firmly in the "more bad than good" territory. What the hell is he supposed to do about all this shit? He alluded to therapy when he talked with Eddie at work the other day, but he’s not going to do that. Therapy is totally hit or miss for him. He’s been to two therapists, one was a miss, one a hit, which means he’s due for another miss. He’s sure as hell not going to talk to Maddie about it, because that’d be, like, super triggering or something. She just got over her own kidnapping a few years ago. And who else, Eddie? Eddie had a traumatic experience in New Mexico as well; he doesn’t need to be responsible for Buck’s too. But the fact of the matter is, something’s got to change. So, Buck decides to start self-medicating. ~ or canon compliant up until s9ep14 (DIY), after that it's just angst and hurt and maybe occasional comfort

entry.title: cause in your pickup truck with all of your dumb luck is the only place I think I'd ever wanna be
entry.summary:
Author: peachicedtea73

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,741Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 114

Summary: He heard breathing, heavy breathing. Breathing that he had only heard on rare occasions. He had seen and heard Buck cry many times before, but this was different, more urgent.Eddie was at the door with his keys in an instant, before Buck was even able to get a word out. “Eddie, I–I need help,” he said through sobs.“I’ll be there in five.”It was a ten minute drive. ... following the events of 9x14, eddie grows increasingly worried about buck's mental stability. read notes!!
